name: feedback-button
title: Feedback Button
description: A floating trigger, a compose dialog with report kinds and an optional screenshot, a staged send with a progress bar, and a confirmation.

meta.cssSyncedWith: styles.css — the `lc-` accent block there is the same CSS as the `css` field below, one authored for the dev app and one shipped on `shadcn add`. Edit the two together, or a consumer installs a stale version of these utilities.
